Dance Lessons & Packages

Learn to dance with confidence. Whether it’s your wedding first dance, a special celebration, or personal growth, we offer customized lesson packages tailored to your needs.

What We Teach

Dance Styles

  • Country Two Step - Perfect for country celebrations
  • Waltz - Classic elegance and grace
  • Swing - High-energy fun and movement
  • Salsa - Passion, rhythm, and flair
  • Bachata - Romantic and intimate connection

Lesson Options

Wedding Packages (Most Popular)

Perfect for couples preparing for their big day!

  • 4-Lesson Package - $299 (Great for experienced dancers)
  • 6-Lesson Package - $429 (Our most popular choice)
  • 8-Lesson Package - $549 (Includes father-of-bride dance + family practice)

View Full Details →

Individual Lessons

  • 1-hour private lesson: $75
  • Build confidence at your own pace
  • Perfect for solo dancers or first-timers

Group Lessons

  • Multiple couples or small groups
  • Custom pricing based on group size
  • Great for family celebrations or bridal parties

Lesson Locations

In-Studio

Madison, Georgia

  • Professional studio with mirrors
  • Climate-controlled
  • Full audio system

In-Home

Available throughout Georgia

  • Private, relaxed setting
  • $50 travel fee
  • Same professional instruction

How to Book

  1. Choose your package (wedding, individual, or group)
  2. Select your location (studio or in-home)
  3. Contact us with your preferred dates and times
  4. Get started and build confidence for your celebration!

What to Expect

  • Personalized coaching tailored to your pace
  • Clear, step-by-step instruction for both lead and follow
  • Music selection with your song choice
  • Choreography that fits your style and celebration
  • Confidence building so you feel amazing on your special day

Ready to learn? Contact us to book your lessons and get started!
